data.title: Grayscale Launches New Trust Fund For Decentralized Price Data Access
data.description: According to Odaily, Grayscale has introduced a new trust fund named Grayscale PYTH Trust. This initiative aims to offer investors the opportunity to access decentralized price data through the Pyth network.

data.title: Proposed US gold reserve audit could spur blockchain adoption for sovereign reserve tracking, analysts say
data.description:
Gold prices have increased amid calls for a Fort Knox audit, sparking debates over asset oversight and the potential for blockchain tracking.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/341349/proposed-us-gold-reserve-audit-could-spur-blockchain-adoption-for-sovereign-reserve-tracking-analysts-say?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Analyst: SOL long-term investors show signs of anxiety
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to crypto analyst Ali Martinez, who posted on the X platform, long-term investors in Solana (SOL) are showing signs of anxiety as market conditions remain uncertain.

data.title: LBank will list Broccoli (BROCCOLI3)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, LBank will launch Broccoli (BROCCOLI3) at 22:00 (SGT) on February 18, and open the BROCCOLI3/USDT trading pair. The deposit service will be opened at 21:00 on February 18, and the withdrawal service will be opened at 21:00 on February 19.

data.title: Ether reserves on exchanges hit 9-year low as supply shrinks
data.description:
Diminishing Ether supply on exchanges may signal an incoming price rally driven by a “supply shock,” which occurs when strong buyer demand meets decreasing available ETH.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/ether-exchange-reserves-drop-nine-year-low-bullish-sentiment?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: OSL: Hong Kong’s digital asset regulatory framework has undergone a significant upgrade, and digital assets and TradFi are merging at an unexpected speed
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News At the Web3 Connect: An Institutional-Focused Forum event co-hosted by OSL, Blockdaemon and Solomon, OSL Chief Institutional Business Officer (CIBO) Zhang Yinghua said that Hong Kong's regulatory framework is undergoing a significant upgrade, among which the scale of spot digital asset ETFs has continued to grow since its launch, and the integration of digital assets and traditional finance (TradFi) is advancing at an unexpected speed, especially in the field of stablecoins and cross-border transactions. Liquidity optimization and product innovation will become the focus of the next stage, and the tokenization of physical assets (Retail RWA) will be gradually standardized, gradually opening up new investment channels. Zhang Yinghua emphasized that the maturity of the digital asset market will be measured by two yardsticks-the depth of institutional participation and the inclusiveness of supervision. The unique value of Hong Kong lies in building market trust through the licensing system and retaining innovation flexibility through the sandbox mechanism. In the future, the "compliant middleware" that connects traditional financial data and on-chain assets will become the core of industry infrastructure competition.

data.title: Grayscale launches Grayscale PYTH Trust
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to market news, Grayscale launched the Grayscale PYTH Trust trust fund.

data.title: Meme Coin Market Cap Returns To November 2024 Levels
data.description: According to Odaily, IntoTheBlock shared on the X platform that after several months of decline, the market capitalization of meme coins has returned to levels seen in November 2024. This downturn has effectively erased all gains from the winter memecoin surge.

data.title: Michael Saylor: Strategy did not buy any Bitcoin last week and currently holds 478,740 BTC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Michael Saylor posted on the X platform that Strategy did not buy any Bitcoin last week, nor did it sell any Class A common stock according to its market value stock issuance plan. As of February 17, 2025, it held 478,740 BTC, with an average purchase price of approximately US$65,033.

data.title: MicroStrategy Withholds Bitcoin Transaction Details
data.description: According to Foresight News, Aggr News reports that MicroStrategy has not disclosed information regarding its Bitcoin purchases and sales from last week.
